# New Epics to Implement

## Failing E2E Tests

In the last sprint, it seems you did not run the e2e tests locally, and they are not run as part of the CI, so you did not see that we have failing e2e tests that show you did not complete the work you were supposed to do.

Run the following e2e tests and fix the failing tests:

- First run and fix `pnpm run e2e:dms-material:chromium` until all the tests pass.
- Second, run and fix `pnpm run e2e:dms-material:firefox` until all the tests pass.
- Loop through the above two steps until all the tests pass in both browsers.

**IMPORTANT**: You should assume the tests are correct and that they are testing the right things, so you should not change the tests, but instead, you should change your code to make the tests pass.
**IMPORTANT**: If you need further clarification about what an e2e test is evaluating, you can refer to the epics and related stories in epics-2026-03-31.md located in \_bmad-output/planning-artifacts where the tests were originally created for the related epic. **IMPORTANT** do no use epics-2026-03-31.md for any purpose OTHER THAN clarification we are creating a new epic to fix the fact that the e2e tests were never run and are now failing, so we want to keep the original epics and stories as they were when the tests were created to avoid confusion.
